title: Suspensions and permanent exclusions in England: 2023 to 2024
body: "This publication presents statistics on suspensions and permanent exclusions within the academic year 2023 to 2024, across state-funded schools.  The publication includes data on:   reasons schools report for suspending and excluding pupils suspensions and exclusions by pupil characteristics   The data has been collected in the school census. Data for earlier years is also included. "
